## Summary

Describe the change clearly and briefly.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Chore
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Related Issue

Link the issue, ticket, or context if available.

## What Changed

- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Fixtures
- [ ] Page objects
- [ ] API clients
- [ ] Bruno collection
- [ ] GitHub Actions / workflows
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

List the commands or checks you ran.

```bash
npm run lint
npm run format:check
npm run typecheck
```

Add any relevant Playwright or Bruno validation details below.

## Risk and Impact

- What could be affected by this change?
- Any secrets, auth flows, environment variables, or CI behavior involved?
- Any backward compatibility considerations?

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch follows the repo naming strategy
- [ ] I tested the change locally where practical
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior or setup changed
- [ ] I did not include secrets, tokens, or sensitive auth artifacts
- [ ] I used the correct target branch for this PR
